creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: zeising
Date: Mon Nov  4 18:08:21 UTC 2019
New revision: 516730
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/516730

Log:
  Retire XORG_CAT

  Retire XORG_CAT, it is not needed since all ports has moved to use
  USES=xorg-cat.
  Add a check to bsd.sanity.mk causing an error if any port happens to set it
  in the future.

  PR:		241694
  Approved by:	portmgr (mat)

Changes:
  head/Mk/bsd.port.mk
  head/Mk/bsd.sanity.mk
